## Summary

- 

## Content risk

- [ ] Low risk: wording, formatting, clarity, or general founder advice.
- [ ] Medium risk: market data, program/funding details, ecosystem lists, or factual claims.
- [ ] High risk: legal, tax, VAT, RJSC, employment, fintech, healthtech, privacy, import/export, government incentives, or personal/company claims.

## Citation and review checklist

- [ ] Every factual claim I changed has a nearby source or is covered in the page sources.
- [ ] Official or primary sources are used where available.
- [ ] High-risk pages include `risk_level: high`, `last_verified`, and a sources section.
- [ ] High-risk changes have human editor/domain expert review before publish.
- [ ] AI was used only for drafting, summarizing, or comparison; it was not treated as approval.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run content:qa -- --changed --base origin/main`
- [ ] `npm run build`
